title: BitSight Company Details API - One-Year Ratings History And Risk Vector Context
applies_to: BitSight rating history extraction for one company
BitSight trend reporting that needs one year of daily ratings and risk vector context

confirmed_facts.fact: The Company Details endpoint is GET https://api.bitsighttech.com/ratings/v1/companies/{company_guid}.
The endpoint returns company details including current rating, rating history, risk vector grades, company information, and relationship details.
The response includes a ratings array containing one year of daily security ratings, starting with the most recent entry.
Each ratings entry includes rating_date, rating, range, and rating_color.
The response includes rating_details by risk vector, including grade, percentile, category, beta, and display_url fields.
The fields query parameter can limit the response to selected values such as industry_average and industry_percentile.

implementation_notes: Use this endpoint when the report needs daily rating history for a single company and current risk vector context in one response family.
Flatten the ratings array into one row per company per rating_date before loading it into SharePoint or Power BI.
Keep the top-level current rating separate from the historical ratings array so reports can distinguish current-state KPIs from time-series facts.
If the workflow already has company GUIDs from a portfolio or current-ratings pull, this endpoint is the natural follow-up for detailed trend analysis.
caveats: This endpoint is company-specific, so portfolio-wide trend reporting still requires iterating across company GUIDs that your BitSight tenant can access.
The one-year ratings history is bounded to the period returned by the endpoint; longer-term history requires persisted extracts or report artifacts saved over time.
